candidate.professional_summary: Senior iOS engineer focused on maintainable mobile architectures, product delivery, and cross-functional execution across consumer and B2B applications.
education: B.Sc. in Computer Science — Example University

bullets: Delivered reusable mobile architecture patterns for a subscription product used across multiple feature teams.
Improved release confidence by standardizing CI pipelines, pull request review checklists, and regression practices.
Partnered with product and design to translate roadmap goals into scoped iOS delivery plans.
Built patient-facing onboarding and account flows for a regulated mobile product.
Reduced maintenance overhead by consolidating legacy screens into a modular UIKit codebase.
Worked closely with backend and QA teammates to stabilize release readiness.
